name: Dropdown Table Widget
description: SAC Table Widget with inline dropdown cell selection from data binding dimensions

styleConfig.description: JSON string with style configuration from styling panel

dropdownOptions.description: JSON array defining options per column: [{dimensionKey, options:[]}]

dropdownDimensions.description: JSON array of dimension feed IDs to render as dropdown e.g. ["dimensions_1","dimensions_2"]

selectedCellData.description: JSON string of the last selected cell {row, dimensionId, memberId, memberLabel}

headerColor.description: Background color of the header row

dropdownHighlightColor.description: Highlight color for selected dropdown item

rowHeight.description: Height of each row in pixels

colWidth.description: Column width: auto or pixel value

setDropdownOptions.description: Define dropdown options per column. Pass array: [{dimensionKey:'dimensions_1', options:['Mensal','Bimestral',...]}]

setDropdownDimensions.description: Define which dimension feed IDs render as dropdown e.g. ["dimensions_1","dimensions_2"]

parameters.name: val
parameters.description: JSON array of dimension feed IDs

getDropdownDimensions.description: Get dropdown dimension config as JSON string

getSelectedCellData.description: Get the last selected cell data as JSON string

getActiveFilters.description: Get all active dropdown filters as JSON string

onDropdownChanged.description: Fired when a dropdown value is selected. Read selectedCellData for {row, dimensionId, memberId, memberLabel}.

feeds.description: Dimensions — populate rows and dropdown option lists
